# github-validate-pr


Find vulnerabilities or errors in a pull request (checks, scans, merge blockers) and propose fixes.



## Triggers

- Use the skill `github-validate-pr`

- Validate a pull request for checks and blockers

- Review PR CI status and merge blockers




## What I do

- Ask which PR to validate (number or URL).

- List PRs assigned to you so you can pick one quickly.

- Inspect CI/check failures, required checks, and merge blockers.

- Look for security signals such as vulnerability findings when available.

- Produce an actionable checklist to get the PR merge-ready.




## Usage examples

- When you want a thorough validation report before merging a PR.

- Ask for failing jobs, blockers, and next steps for the pull request.
